queryList.1: hp_slave: select ac.address_config_id as addressConfigId, ac.country_name as countryName, ac.province_name as provinceName, ac.city_name as cityName, ac.special_city_mark as specialCityMark, haf.fence_latlng as fenceLatLng, haf.fence_name as fenceName from address_config ac left join hp_area_fence haf on haf.city_id = ac.address_config_id where ac.is_del = 0 and (haf.id > 0 or ac.special_city_mark = 1)
queryList.2: hp_slave: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716814
queryList.3: hp_slave: select city_id, city, time_zone, is_fix_point, sort_distance_wight, city_name_en, is_open_faraway, activity_status, inlet_tips, share_picture, travel_mode,is_use_index_module,age_limit,city_shop_sort,city_shop_evaluation_config,is_use_index_module_en, take_meal_after_out,driver_operation_distance_limit_type,open_languge_page,map_resource, polling_on_off,excise_calculate_type,is_del,city_code,delivery_map_resource,order_tax_type, tab_voucher,deliverable_action from city_config where city = '九江市' and is_del = 0 limit 1
queryList.4: hp_slave: SELECT imd.index_module_detail_id, imd.module_activity_id, im.module_name, imd.content, imd.img_url, imd.sort, imd.title, imd.type, imd.url, imd.postcode, imd.parent_title, imd.sub_title, imd.visible_type, im.is_auto_associate_city, imd.dimension, im.operate_area_id, imd.is_show_bubble , imd.bubble_content , imd.ad_type , imd.absolute_sort, imd.ad_id, imd.icon_color, imd.img_url_new, imd.jump_data, imd.small_img_url FROM index_module_detail imd LEFT JOIN index_module im ON im.index_module_id = imd.index_module_id WHERE im.city_name = '九江市' AND im.status = 1 AND im.operate_area_id = 0 AND im.visible_type in(0,2) AND imd.visible_type in(0,2) AND imd.sts = 1 AND imd.`status`=1 AND im.module_type = 24 AND im.language_code = 'CN' order by imd.sort DESC,imd.create_time desc
queryList.5: hp_slave: select shop_id ,send_money from hp_shop_search_middle where shop_id in ( 54329731 , 160288176 , 345263066 , 387549545 , 617846488 , 669770737 , 863876353 )
queryList.6: hp_slave: SELECT a.shop_id, b.discount_sn, b.date_type, b.day_limit, b.time_limit, b.time_slot_type, b.crowd, c.sub_state, c.break_type, d.city FROM hp_delivery_discount_shop a LEFT JOIN hp_delivery_discount b ON a.discount_sn = b.discount_sn LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config c ON b.activity_sn = c.activity_sn LEFT JOIN shop d on a.shop_id=d.shop_id WHERE b.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND b.discount_status = 1 AND b.start_time <= 1749192271911 AND b.end_time > 1749192271911 AND a.shop_id IN ( 54329731 ) AND 1749192271911 between a.start_time and a.end_time
queryList.7: hp_slave: select count(1) from member_entity where user_id = 1398716814 and is_del = 0 and status = 1 and member_start_time < 1749192271915 and member_end_time > 1749192271915
queryList.8: hp_slave: select rec_id,user_id,device_id,label_group,label_id,create_time,update_time from hp_user_label WHERE user_id = 1398716814 and label_group = 'new' limit 1
queryList.9: hp_slave: select distinct u.red_packet_id,u.collect_source from user_cdKey u where u.user_id=1398716814 and u.language_code in ('ALL' , 'CN') and u.is_used=0 and u.lock_status=0 and u.is_del=0 and u.start_time <= 1749192271922 and u.end_time >= 1749192271922 and u.status = 1 and (u.member_entity_id is null or u.member_entity_id = 0) and (u.city = '九江市' or u.city = '')
queryList.10: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'FIRST_ORDER_DELIVERY_CONFIG' limit 1
queryList.11: hp_slave: select mc.member_city_id,mcr.city_name from member_city mc, member_city_relation mcr,address_config a where mc.`member_city_id` = mcr.`member_city_id` AND mcr.city_name = a.`city_name` AND mc.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND mcr.`city_name` in ( '九江市' ) AND mc.online_status = 1 ORDER BY mc.`create_time` DESC
queryList.12: hp_slave: select id ,start_using ,day_limit ,member_city_id ,create_time ,create_user_id ,update_time ,update_user_id ,is_del from hp_membership_plus_cycle_configuration where is_del = 0 and start_using = 1 and member_city_id in ( 1111378 )
queryList.13: hp_slave: SELECT sdsc.shop_id, sdsc.discount_rate, sdsc.member_day_discount_rate, sdsc.member_day_subsidy_price, sdsc.subsidy_price, sdsc.subsidy_type, sdsc.activity_sn, sdsc.member_day_activity_sn, sdsc.subsidy_threshold, sdsc.subsidy_status, sdsc.member_day_threshold FROM hp_shop_discount_subsidy_config sdsc WHERE sdsc.is_del = 0 and sdsc.subsidy_status = 0 and sdsc.shop_id in ( 387549545 , 669770737 , 617846488 , 863876353 , 160288176 , 54329731 , 345263066 )
